## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `smuler plugin publish --check` (or `smuler theme publish --check`)
- [ ] Archive is signed with my Ed25519 keypair
- [ ] `url` points to the release asset download
- [ ] `sha256` matches the archive file
- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
